channel.title: Minxie's Digital Garden
channel.description: Updates from my corner of the web and the Tism-Webring.

item.title: Sad news: I have to block Dach region visitors!
item.description: Today i decided to go against german laws, i had the hard descission of either: giving my address out to ANYONE, OR i would stop serving the DACH region.. (DE,A,CH). after a long thinking period i opted for the latter.. my site now serves everyone BUT Dach members. you can still circumvent that with a VPN, it will set a cookie that expires after a year, so after logging in oce you will not need the vpn again for a whole year.. this was a hard descicion to make.. "what about me? what am i supposed to do?" i have a whitelist on my server, you can write me an email if you are subject to the regionlock and i am more than happy to add you to the list! -Minx

item.title: Launched the Webring Community Hub!
item.description: I've finally finished the PHP aggregator for our webring. Now everyone can see each other's latest posts in one place.

item.title: Hello World from Arch Linux
item.description: Just a quick update about my current KDE setup and some new scripts I wrote.
